assertions.reason: The live liquidation tx 0xa1ad2ca7c7ada4cee6daa13e11866ae56ec8bc7b57b7a302c7837c39f2083b03 emitted Liquidated with non-zero correlationId 0xca4aaead..., but HookRegistry emitted HookFailed instead of HookExecuted and no LiquidationNotified event was found. The historical correlator fetched 1 Liquidated, 0 LiquidationNotified, and 1 ReceiptReceived event, then found 0 correlations, so the on-chain hook/notifier leg is not proven.

The canonical deployment proves deposit via LendingRouter (tx 0x6abdb0c6...), borrow with QuoteVerified and Borrowed(correlationId=0x98c58249...) (tx 0x4d6104a5...), and liquidation with Liquidated(correlationId=0xca4aaead...) (tx 0xa1ad2ca7...). It does not prove the full required cycle because there are zero Repaid events on LendingEngine from the proof start block to latest, and the only liquidation is self-liquidation of the same address as borrower and liquidator rather than a distinct second position.
evidence: deposit tx 0x6abdb0c6... -> to LendingRouter, CollateralDeposited(account=0x36a83a..., correlationId=0x266edf0b...)
live event scan from block 6584400 -> repaid=0

assertions.reason: XcmInbox.receiveReceipt is only proven for receipt correlationId 0xf393acd4... in tx 0xb5eeb353..., not for the liquidation correlationId 0xca4aaead.... Live reads show hasProcessed(0xca4aaead...) = false and hasProcessed(0xf393acd4...) = true. Combined with the missing HookExecuted/LiquidationNotified leg, the live proof does not connect HookRegistry and XcmInbox through one shared correlationId.
evidence: cast call hasProcessed(0xca4aaead...) -> false; hasProcessed(0xf393acd4...) -> true

assertions.reason: The current canonical M11 artifacts do not show one connected live async bilateral trace. The proof window contains deposit, borrow, liquidation, and a separate inbox receipt, but no repay tx, no LiquidationNotified event, no HookExecuted event, and no matching liquidation/receipt correlationId. The correlator therefore reports 0 connected traces, so the live partial proof required by the assertion is still not satisfied.
evidence: live event counts since block 6584400 -> borrowed=1, repaid=0, liquidated=1, liquidationNotified=0, receiptReceived=1

blockers.description: The live liquidation hook reached LiquidationHookRegistry but emitted HookFailed with the revert reason "XCM send failed: destination or message format may be incompatible", so no LiquidationNotified event was produced in the proof window.
